title: Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner.Removes Grease, Odour And Limescale 250Ml
features: DUZZIT DISHWASHER CLEANER: Keep your dishwasher cleaner, removes build up of grease, detergents and limescale increasing performance
FITS ALL DISHWASHERS: The bottle is designed to fit the upper shelf of all dishwashers
CLEANS & FRESHENS: A single bottle will clean and descale the dishwasher, including the hidden parts and neutralises odour, leaving a sparkling clean fresh dishwasher
EASY TO USE: Remove the dishwasher filter, remove bottle cap, place the bottle upside down on the upper shelf of an empty dishwasher and run dishwasher on a standard programme
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Pack of two bottles each 250ml
description: Product Description Duzzit Dishwasher Cleaner Descaler will keep your dishwasher cleaner, it removes build up of grease, detergents and limescale increasing performance and prolonging the life of the dishwasher. Suitable for the top shelf of all dishwashers. A single bottle will clean and descale the dishwasher, including the hidden parts and neutralises odour leaving a sparkling clean fresh dishwasher. Pack contains two bottles each 250ml. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume Directions Remove the dishwasher filter, remove bottle cap, place the bottle upside down on the upper shelf of an empty dishwasher, run dishwasher on a standard programme.
